title: @sydneyrunkle: this is a fantastic example of a robust agentic memory system built on langgraph...
rawContent:
Tweet by @sydneyrunkle (Sydney Runkle)
Author bio: open source dev @LangChain
Text: this is a fantastic example of a robust agentic memory system built on langgraph!

there's 4 key parts
1. retrieval (rag)
2. storage, fragmented by memory type
3. reasoning*
4. learning (often called dreaming)

*reasoning - super interesting, this agent applies "a set of explicit reasoning constraints" like date cross checks and data isolation measures. 

exciting to see these learnings open sourced!
